Covering the UK with a network of trusted brands, we bring expert property services to every corner of the country
Spanning the UK, our network of local, trusted brands each bring their own unique identity, combining deep regional expertise with a shared commitment to growth, innovation and exceptional service.

"Investing in highly motivated individuals, eager to learn and develop their skills and knowledge – is what gives us the edge."
Clare Wakeford, Chief People Officer

You’re in safe hands when you partner with us
We’re building a network of standout brands by partnering with founders ready to take the next step. If you’re thinking about selling your business but want to see it grow with care, support and a shared vision - we’d love to talk about what comes next.

Learn more

Lomond achieves two prestigious workplace awards
Lomond named as one of the UK’s Best Places to Work 2026 for Development and included in The Sunday Times Very Big Organisation category.

Contact us

Applying property wisdom to help businesses thrive

Who we are

As the UK’s leading network of Lettings and Sales agents, we know property.

Lomond has over 2,600 employees, 72,000 properties under management, 150+ branches and has completed 70+ acquisitions. Lomond currently operates in key regions across the UK including Scotland, Yorkshire, the North West, Midlands, London, Kent and the South Coast, with ongoing discussions of expansion to several new cities.

0 +
Properties under management

0 +
Branches across the UK

0 +
Employees

Our Brands

Why referring leads strengthens every client journey
With a diverse network under one vision, we bring clarity, consistency and purpose. Our strength lies in local expertise — powered by a national network united by shared values, a common vision and the people behind the work.

What we do

"People are our greatest asset and at Lomond, we want our people to thrive in their careers, as it is a true reflection of excellence."
Ed Phillips, Chief Executive Officer

Behind every success is a dedicated team of people who make it happen
At Lomond, we bring together a diverse network of talent, from experienced agents on the ground to the specialists behind the scenes driving marketing, operations and growth. Our strength lies in our people and their expertise.

Meet our leaders

Our values born from property wisdom at work
Lomond’s WISE values - Wisdom, Integrity, Success and Evolution - serve as the foundation that aligns every team member with our vision.

Wisdom
Investing in highly motivated individuals, eager to develop the skills & knowledge that gives us the edge.

Integrity
Encouraging honest and transparent interactions at every stage and with everyone.

Success
Proud to achieve great results and excellent customer feedback, enabling us to flourish & grow.

Evolution
We’re a business constantly innovating, improving and evolving into the best that we can be.

A culture where
everyone can thrive
At Lomond, we believe a strong workplace culture is built on inclusion, opportunity and growth. We’re proud to foster an environment where everyone feels welcome—and every individual has a fair chance to learn, develop and succeed.

Life at Lomond

Enabling excellence across all functions
Each department works in harmony to drive growth at every level of our business.

Find out more

Property Management
Lettings
Sales
Administration
Marketing
Technology
Operations
Compliance
Finance & Accounts
Human Resources
Graduates

Coming together to support young people facing homelessness
We’re proud to have raised over £75,000 for Centrepoint, supporting young people facing homelessness across the UK. From cycling challenges and dragon boat races to sleepouts and fun runs, this milestone reflects the dedication of our teams and the impact we can make together.

Contribute to change

“Every role, whether front-line negotiator, support staff, or management, plays a critical part in upholding our vision.”
Eric O'Halleran, Head of L&D

Shaping growth through learning & engagement
In every moment of reflection, we find new ways to engage, empower and elevate our people. Our Talent Development team is the catalyst behind meaningful growth and lasting impact.

Find out more

Discover a career where you can make a difference
We're always looking for curious minds, bold thinkers and passionate doers. Explore opportunities to grow your career with us.

Careers at Lomond

People are everything at Lomond

MEET THE TEAM

As the UK’s leading network of Lettings and Sales agents, we know property.  

Lomond has over 2,600 employees, 72,000 properties under management, 200 branches and has completed 70+ acquisitions. Lomond currently operates in key regions across the UK including Scotland, Yorkshire, the North West, Midlands, London, Kent and the South Coast, with ongoing discussions of expansion to several new cities.

Get in touch
with us
Have a question or need more information? Get in touch with us today.

Public relations
For press enquiries, get in touch with our PR team. We're here to help.

Contact PR

Interested in selling you business? Contact our team to explore opportunities.
